Title: Hebi no michi de inemuri Gokû ga okkochiru
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Hiromi Tsuru, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: Kuririn and Buruma search for Tenshinhan and Chaozu, who are training under a waterfall, and Ranchi tries to convince Tenshinhan to rob banks with her. Meanwhile, Son Gokû gets a ride in Hebi no Michi from an Untenshu and Gohan co...
